title: inga lateriflora
intro: Inga lateriflora, also known as the "Cacao de monte", is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions. The health benefits of Inga lateriflora include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
